properties.Title: Core Gameplay QA
Level Elements QA
Boosters and Onboarding QA
Daily and Competitive QA
UI, Infrastructure, and LiveOps QA
Player resolves a board by tapping valid snakes
Player encounters obstacle and support elements
Player uses boosters from inventory or ad flow
Player receives daily and competitive rewards
QA verifies UI and backend operational coverage

properties.Task title: Verify clear-path snake exits and is removed
properties.Description: Check that tapping a snake with an unobstructed path plays the exit animation, removes the snake, and credits progress.

properties.Task title: Verify blocked snake costs health once
properties.Description: Check that the first wrong tap on a blocked snake costs one health and repeated taps on the same blocked snake do not re-penalize.

properties.Task title: Verify Wall countdown and collision behavior
properties.Description: Check wall blocking, countdown decrement on successful snake exits, disappearance at zero, and collision health loss.
Check paired Black Hole entry, exit, and teleport animation behavior for snakes passing through the portal.

properties.Task title: Verify Hint booster cost and effect
properties.Description: Check Hint cost, ad alternative, inventory decrement, and highlight behavior for an escapable snake.

properties.Task title: Verify Grid Vision booster cost and arrows
properties.Description: Check Grid Vision cost, ad alternative, inventory decrement, and simultaneous directional exit arrows.

properties.Task title: Verify Tournament unlock, scoring, and reward lifecycle
properties.Description: Check level 14 unlock, score and streak multiplier handling, leaderboard reward mapping, and lifecycle service behavior.
properties.Feature name: Wall Obstacle with Countdown and Collision Feedback

properties.Task title: Verify screen inventory, navigation, localisation, and theme variants
properties.Description: Check major screens, navigation flow, dark mode, landscape, and localisation expansion risks.
